O-Glyphs 1–9: Foundational Cycle
Author: Eugene Allen
Date and Time: May 09, 2025 – 12:32 AM

O-Glyph 1: Spark
This glyph is the beginning of everything. It represents the very first moment something exists—the ignition point. It sits in the center of the grid and doesn’t move. Like a breath before motion, it simply says, “I’m here.”

O-Glyph 2: Flow
After the spark, energy begins to move. This glyph shows the first step, the first wave, the beginning of motion. It's like water starting to pour or a breeze starting to drift.
